body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Thermodynamics v1.1.0 was has some type instability and causes GPU failures. This PR allows Thermodynamics v1.0.x and v1.2.x.

Note that the tilde specifier for versions starting with a 1 is more similar to the behavior for versions with a leading 0 than the default caret specifier (see [Julia manual section](https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/compatibility/#Tilde-specifiers)). I think this works better with the release patterns we use, so I'm using that here.

Also, I thought previously that if we put a compat in the top-level Project it would be inherited by sub-environments, but it seems like that is not the case, so I added the compat to all Projects.
title: add Thermodynamics compat to all projects

body:
This PR updates the compat to use the latest version of ClimaTimeSteppers.jl and ClimaUtilities.jl.

The previous releases of ClimaTimeSteppers.jl (0.8.9 - 0.8.11) are not compatible of ClimaLand and earlier versions of ClimaUtilities.jl are not compatible with the release of CFTime v0.2.7 (see [PR](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaUtilities.jl/pull/207) in ClimaUtilities.jl).
title: Update compat for CTS and ClimaUtilities
